summary: VenuLock Landing Page UI Refinement Pass - 100% PASS. Tested all 23 features on both Desktop (1920px) and Mobile (390px) viewports. All header elements, hero typography, search forms, trust badges, and below-the-fold sections render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code structure is well-organized with clear separation of mobile/desktop variants using lg:hidden and hidden lg:block
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testability
Component decomposition is good with SearchDropdown and DesktopDropdown components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive UI refinement testing complete. All responsive variants working correctly. Key verified items across both mobile and desktop: VENU|LOCK wordmark, hero 'We Talk. You Lock.' headline with gold accent, search forms with City/Nearby toggle, 3 trust badges, Why VenuLock (3 cards), Social Proof (500+, 100%, End-to-End stats), How It Works (steps 01, 02, 03), Venue Experts section (3 cards), Platform Capabilities (4 cards), Browse by City (4 city cards), Work With Us (List Your Venue + Partner With Us), Final CTA with Start Booking, Footer with all navigation links and Privacy Policy/Terms of Service.

desktop_view_1920px.why_venulock_section: PASS - 3 cards: Curated Matches, Smart Comparison, Booking Support
desktop_view_1920px.venue_experts_section: PASS - 3 expert cards with name, city, rating, events, languages
desktop_view_1920px.browse_by_city_section: PASS - 4 city cards (Delhi, Gurgaon, Greater Noida, Noida)
desktop_view_1920px.work_with_us_section: PASS - List Your Venue + Partner With Us cards
desktop_view_1920px.final_cta_section: PASS - 'Ready to lock your venue?' + Start Booking button

footer_section.city_links: PASS - Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad

header_tests.hamburger_menu_items: PASS - Sign In, Browse Venues, List Your Venue, Get Started

mobile_view_390px.trust_badges: PASS - Verified Venues, Transparent Pricing, Booking Support
